title: pyrus nivalis
intro: Pyrus nivalis, also known as the winter pear or snow pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus nivalis include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in herbal teas and tinctures.
